title: Dividend Remittance Policy for State-Owned Enterprises
description: All SOEs and investment holding companies must remit a minimum of 30% of net profit as dividends to the Government of Zambia within 90 days of financial year end.

issuingAuthority: Ministry of Mines and Minerals Development
title: Local Content Requirements for Mining Procurement
description: Mining companies must achieve minimum 30% local content in procurement of goods and services by December 2025, increasing to 50% by 2027.

title: Performance Contract Framework for SOEs
description: All SOEs must sign annual performance contracts with their line ministries and the Ministry of Finance by 31 March each year, incorporating financial and non-financial KPIs.

title: Environmental Impact Assessment for Mine Expansions
description: All mine expansion projects exceeding ZMW 500 million must complete a full Environmental Impact Assessment before commencement of construction activities.

title: Enhanced Disclosure Requirements for Listed Companies
description: Listed companies must publish quarterly financial results within 45 days of quarter end and disclose all material transactions above ZMW 50 million.
